subject: WM-0178 raw admission byte preservation follow-up
body: Post-review-request evidence storage follow-up: final-repaired-main/.gitattributes uses admission.json -text -diff. The stale pre-attribute cached blob e5fde6176fabf69b2bcc7a345d88a2f77ce4f2c1 / A9335689 was blocked, acknowledged and unblocked; the single authorized renormalize produced raw blob d6646c860551a476cfebccf90af95d75fe1f1322 / SHA-256 66AD2D39, stable after ordinary add and after commit 65df446. All 16 evidence/sidecar files remain exact, cached diff check passes and WM-0178 remains review_requested. Please include this recovery in independent review.
